command.mermaidGantt.showParserInfo.titl: Mermaid Gantt Editor: Show Parser Info
command.mermaidGantt.openTaskGrid.title: Mermaid Gantt Editor: Open Gantt Editor
command.mermaidGantt.formatSource.title: Mermaid Gantt Editor: Format Mermaid Gantt Source
configuration.mermaidGantt.format.title: Mermaid Gantt Editor Formatting
configuration.mermaidGantt.format.enable: Enable Mermaid Gantt source formatting commands and save hooks.
configuration.mermaidGantt.format.onSave: Format Mermaid Gantt source when saving. Disabled by default to avoid unexpected source diffs.
configuration.mermaidGantt.format.indent: Indent mode for Mermaid Gantt formatting. The official mode follows Mermaid's sample style.
Number of spaces used for official Mermaid Gantt indentation.
configuration.mermaidGantt.format.alignT: Align task colons when formatting Mermaid Gantt task rows.
configuration.mermaidGantt.format.blankL: Insert a blank line before each section when formatting Mermaid Gantt source.
